member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.BigQuery.BigQueryService
member.summary: BigQuery operations: list/import accounts and persist results under project folder. Refactored to remove hardcoded project IDs and LLM dependencies.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.BigQuery.BigQueryService.PerformBigQueryResultsAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Performs BigQuery operations using AI to interpret and execute queries.
member.param: The instruction for the BigQuery agent
The project ID to work with
member.returns: The result of the BigQuery operation
